commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c7cf1c351c236d175dfe7ae00fbb976ba1d8e2f1)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an env-var opt-in that prevents the bundled Google plugin and setup entry from registering the `google-gemini-cli` provider/backend by default, plus tests and a Google rebuild doc.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests +97, Docs +45. Total +160 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and `v2026.6.11` register the Gemini CLI provider/backend by default, while the PR gates both runtime and setup registration behind a new env var. I did not run a live onboarding or upgrade flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blocker is maintainer compatibility/product direction plus missing contributor proof, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: feat(google): gate Gemini CLI runtime harness behind explicit opt-in
target.body:
## Summary

Continues the Google provider rebuild by moving Gemini CLI runtime harness registration out of the bundled Google plugin default path.

- adds `OPENCLAW_ENABLE_GOOGLE_GEMINI_CLI_HARNESS` as an explicit opt-in policy
- keeps the bundled Google plugin on the official `google` provider path by default
- registers the bundled `google-gemini-cli` provider/backend only when the opt-in flag is enabled
- preserves the Google setup entry and setup-registry CLI backend default for compatibility
- updates Google API key wizard copy so the default Google group is API-key only
- adds regression tests for default-disabled and explicit-enabled bundled plugin behavior
- preserves upstream Gemini CLI backend auth-bridge tests

## Compatibility direction

The setup-registry default for `google-gemini-cli` remains available, so existing setup-only backend resolution continues to work. The explicit opt-in applies only to direct bundled runtime registration of the Gemini CLI provider/backend.

## Test plan

Ran after restoring the Google setup compatibility path:

```text
pnpm vitest run extensions/google/gemini-cli-harness-policy.test.ts extensions/google/index-harness-registration.test.ts extensions/google/setup-api.test.ts

RUN  v4.1.8 /home/rev/projects/openclaw-pr-98343

✓  extension-providers  ../../extensions/google/gemini-cli-harness-policy.test.ts (2 tests) 91ms
✓  extension-providers  ../../extensions/google/setup-api.test.ts (13 tests) 74ms
✓  extension-providers  ../../extensions/google/index-harness-registration.test.ts (2 tests) 11ms

Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests  17 passed (17)
Duration  3.12s
```
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
